---
title: "Ch2_Exercises"
output: html_document
---


(1)

(b)
```{r}
# Sketching the posterior distribution as proportional to the sum of three Beta
# distributions: Beta(3,13), Beta(4,12), Beta(5,11)

xs <- seq(0,1,0.001)

density <- choose(10,0)*dbeta(xs,3,13) + choose(10,1)*dbeta(xs,4,12) + choose(10,2)*dbeta(xs,5,11)

plot(xs, density)
```
